issue_title: Nested CSS font-family not working as expected
issue_body_preview:
## Description

Using nuxt fonts to set different fonts for specific CSS classes works perfectly for single-level classes, but when trying to apply a font to nested CSS classes, it does not load as expected.

For example, Lato works fine for `.lato`, but Nunito fails to apply in nested elements like
test_description_zh: 在页面中创建嵌套CSS类结构，外层和内层分别通过CSS类指定不同的字体（如外层使用 .lato 设置 font-family: Lato，内层嵌套类如 .container .nunito 设置 font-family: Nunito）。观察嵌套元素中的字体是否正确加载和渲染。
expected_result_zh: 嵌套CSS类中指定的字体（如 Nunito）应被正确加载并应用到对应的嵌套元素上，文本应以指定的字体渲染显示，与单层CSS类设置字体的效果一致。
